label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial positions. Initially: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Cheerleader - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So, after this swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader (since Dave was there) - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Right Midfielder (since Bob was there) - Eve: Goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. After this: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper (Eve's position) - Eve: Right Midfielder (Dave's previous position, which was Right Midfielder after first swap) Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Now: - Alice: Cheerleader (Bob's position) - Bob: Right Winger (Alice's previous position) - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Right Midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. After this: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Goalkeeper (Dave's position) - Dave: Left Winger (Claire's previous position) - Eve: Right Midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions again. So: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Goalkeeper - Dave: Right Midfielder (Eve's position) - Eve: Left Winger (Dave's previous position, which was Left Winger after fourth swap) So at the end, Bob is playing Right Winger. The options given are: (A) right winger (B) right midfielder (C) left winger (D) cheerleader (E) goalkeeper So the answer should be (A) right winger. Let me double-check my steps to be sure. First swap: Dave (Cheerleader) and Bob (Right Midfielder) switch. So Bob becomes Cheerleader, Dave becomes Right Midfielder. Second swap: Dave (now Right Midfielder) and Eve (Goalkeeper) switch. So Dave becomes Goalkeeper, Eve becomes Right Midfielder. Third swap: Alice (Right Winger) and Bob (Cheerleader) switch. So Alice becomes Cheerleader, Bob becomes Right Winger. Fourth swap: Dave (Goalkeeper) and Claire (Left Winger) switch.
